name: X-Force: Internal Host Communicating with Botnet Command and Control URL
notes: This rule triggers when a local host loads a web URL known to be a Botnet Command and Control server. This is often more accurate than detecting communication with an IP known to be a botnet as legitimate web hosts are often exploited to host command and control servers.
conditions_text: when the event context is Local to Remote
when the event matches XFORCE_URL_CATEGORY("URL") = 'Botnet Command and Control Server' OR XFORCE_URL_CATEGORY("URL Host") = 'Botnet Command and Control Server' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY X-Force: Internal Host Communicating with Botnet Command and Control URL on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event context is Local to Remote
AND when the event matches XFORCE_URL_CATEGORY("URL") = 'Botnet Command and Control Server' OR XFORCE_URL_CATEGORY("URL Host") = 'Botnet Command and Control Server' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Internal Host Communicating with Botnet Command and Control URL
Event description: This rule will notify when an internal client loads a web URL known to be a Botnet Command and Control server.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
